Getting Started w/ Claude Cowork: 10 Essential Workflows (+ prompts)

The only article you need to build life-changing workflows with Claude Cowork.

In this piece, I'm giving you the EXACT prompt you need to start deploying practical Claude Cowork workflows.
My goal with this article is simple: get you started on implementing Claude Cowork with as little friction as possible.
No theoretical builds.
These are the real workflows that are saving non-technical people time/money since Coworks' release.
Just copy/paste the image into any LLM and ask for the text prompt.
Let's dive in.

10. Entire Desktop Cleanse

Use this prompt to give Claude Cowork access to your desktop folders and conduct a deep clean.
Entire Desktop Cleanse

9. Email Inbox Assistant

Turn Cowork into your personal email inbox assistant.
Email Inbox Assistant

8. Weekly Comprehensive Review

A comprehensive weekly productivity review with Claude.
Weekly Comprehensive Review

7. Expense Tracker

A prompt that has Cowork scan your entire desktop to conduct an expense audit (+ upload receipts/bank statements).
Expense Tracker

6. SOP Doc Generator

Use this workflow to generate SOP docs that your future self (and your team) will thank you for.
Codebase Documentation Generator

5. Google Calendar Assistant

Use this workflow to find and book the perfect meeting times without the back-and-forth email nightmare.
Google Calendar Assistant

4. Price Comparison Shopper

Find the best deal on any product without manually checking 20 different sites.
Price Comparison Shopper

3. Subscription Cleaner

Mass unsubscribe from newsletters, spam, etc., flooding your inbox.
Subscription Cleaner

2. Deep Research Assistant

A workflow that generates a comprehensive research report on any topic.
Deep Research Assistant

1. Investment Due Diligence

Turn Claude into your personal financial assistant with this prompt.
Investment Due Diligence

Outro

I hope you found this article helpful for discovering all the things you can do with the new Claude Cowork.
